message:
Fix macOS config path: check XDG-style ~/.config/dcg first

On macOS, `dirs::config_dir()` returns `~/Library/Application Support`
but users expect to use `~/.config/dcg/config.toml` (XDG-style).

Now checks both locations in order:
1. ~/.config/dcg/ (XDG-style, what users expect)
2. Platform-native (~/Library/Application Support/dcg/ on macOS)

Fixes: #16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
